Global (All).title: Cyber-attack on major tech firm
Global (All).summary: A major tech firm has been hit by a cyber-attack, potentially compromising millions of customer records.

Global (All).title: Protests erupt in response to new government decree
Global (All).summary: Large-scale protests have broken out in response to a new government decree that opponents claim restricts civil liberties.

Global (All).title: Global trade tensions escalate
Global (All).summary: Global trade tensions have escalated in the past 7 days, with multiple countries imposing tariffs on each other's goods.

United States.title: US Federal Reserve Raises Interest Rates to Combat Inflation
United States.summary: The US Federal Reserve has raised interest rates to combat inflation, which could impact economic growth and consumer spending.

United States.title: Supreme Court Upholds Abortion Rights in Mississippi Case
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court has upheld abortion rights in a Mississippi case, providing protections for women's reproductive health and rights.

United States.title: California Wildfires Continue to Spread, Causing Evacuations
United States.summary: Severe wildfires continue to spread in California, forcing evacuations and displacing residents, highlighting the need for climate action and disaster preparedness.

South Korea.title: Concerns over Kim Jong Un's Health Amid Speculation
South Korea.summary: Reports of Kim Jong Un's health have sparked concerns in South Korea, potentially posing a threat to regional stability.

South Korea.title: Seoul Raises Alert Level Over North Korea's Missile Threat
South Korea.summary: South Korea has heightened its alert level in response to North Korea's recent missile tests, citing a potential threat to national security.

South Korea.title: South Korea's President Faces Calls for Improved Cybersecurity Measures
South Korea.summary: As South Korea continues to experience a surge in cyberattacks, the president faces increasing pressure to strengthen the country's cybersecurity defenses.

Japan.title: Tsunami Evacuation Drill Conducted in Japan
Japan.summary: A nationwide tsunami evacuation drill was conducted in Japan on July 10, 2024, to test the country's emergency response preparedness.

Japan.title: Japan's Ruling Party Suffers Election Defeat
Japan.summary: Japan's ruling Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) suffered a significant defeat in the July 12, 2024, Upper House election, dealing a blow to Prime Minister's Fumio Kishida's grip on power.

Japan.title: Japan's Aging Population to Reach 30% by 2040
Japan.summary: According to a recent report, Japan's population is expected to become 30% aged by 2040, posing significant socio-economic challenges for the country.
